description.zh-Hans: 使用不同角度的分形噪波正弦波叠加，生成经典等离子效果。根据等离子值在两种颜色之间混合，并输出强度遮罩。
description.en: Generates a classic plasma effect using summed sine waves of fractal noise at different angles. Blends between two colors based on the plasma value and outputs an intensity mask.

triggers.zh-Hans: 等离子, 电浆, 能量效果, 科幻

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成经典等离子效果，双色混合，适合科幻或能量主题纹理。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a classic plasma effect with dual-color blending for sci-fi or energy-themed textures.
